corrections.note: Transcript has final full stop after διεγίνωσκεν, but image shows comma: διεγίνωσκεν, κοινὸν...
Body reads προσαμνήσας; transcript has extra να.
Transcript has final sigma instead of nu: image reads καθώπλισαν.
Transcript badly misread phrase; image reads πολλὰ τῇ ἰδέᾳ διαφέροντα.
Apparatus reading in A is ὑψαυχῶν, not ευψυχῶν.
Ordinal marker is iota with degree sign, not letters iota-omicron.

corrections.current: αυτους ι°] αυτος V* vid αυτὸς Vᵃ
corrections.correct: αυτους ι°] αυτος V* vid αὐτοὺς Vᵃ
corrections.note: Second reading is αὐτοὺς Vᵃ, not αὐτὸς Vᵃ.
Apparatus variant appears to read προσαυμνήσας, not προσαναμνήσας.

uncertain.note: The A reading after υπάρχων is difficult; appears to be ὑψαυχῶν or similar, not the transcript's ευψυχῶν. Exact letters somewhat unclear.

notes: Running head matches. Body transcript incorrectly includes marginal line numbers as verse markers (3,4,5 etc.), but since no dedicated correction anchor is practical here and they recur throughout, batch triage should remove all such captured line numbers from BODY. Apparatus generally matches aside from a few misreadings.
